rationale: UI redesign PR extending the existing 'editorial almanac' visual style from the home/sets pages to three additional client pages. client/src/app/brands/page.tsx replaces the basic `container mx-auto px-4 py-8` with `mx-auto max-w-7xl px-6 lg:px-10`, adds an editorial masthead section ('Publishers — Volume I' eyebrow, `font-display text-5xl md:text-6xl font-light` 'By brand.' headline with italic accent, descriptive paragraph), and wraps the BrandOverviewGrid in a new bordered section. client/src/app/brands/[brand]/page.tsx and client/src/app/set/[id]/edit/page.tsx receive the same container width / spacing treatment plus a unified destructive-state typography. client/src/features/brand/BrandDetailsContent.tsx inlines the back/setClick callbacks and introduces basketball/footballCount totals piped into BrandTabs. BrandOverviewGrid is rewritten to use a `grid grid-cols-1 gap-px bg-border/40 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3` hairline grid (no shadcn Card wrapping) with a new BrandProgressBar component. 642 added lines total covering tabs, masthead, sport tabs, set cards, edit form, and matching save/result panels — all pure UI/UX work matching the PR title 'extend editorial redesign to brands and edit pages' with no test deletions, mock injections, or hidden behavior changes.
